lines.speaker: Tower Mage
lines.text: The Tower of Magic is off limits. Lord Arceuus does not wish his experiments to be disturbed.

lines.speaker: Tower Mage
lines.text: I can't talk I'm afraid. I need to time this experiment.

lines.speaker: Tower Mage
lines.text: Please be careful near the apparatus.

lines.speaker: Tower Mage
lines.text: Hmmm... Maybe eye of newt will work...

lines.speaker: Tower Mage
lines.text: It's going to be interesting to see the results of this test.

lines.speaker: Tower Mage
lines.text: You have been granted permission to enter the Tower of Magic. Move along.
